history
Sir Hamon Massy, the 6th and last baron of Dunham-Massey, son and heir to the 5th, married Isabel, daughter of Humphrey de Beauchamp, and on the marriage-day at night she died before carnal co …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Massey VI於1230年出生在英國爾鄧翰 梅西時，他的父親Hamon de Massey V35歲，母親Alice de Whitney24歲。他於1267年與Alice Beauchamp在英國爾鄧翰 梅西結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國爾鄧翰 梅西。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Massey VI于1230年出生在英国爾鄧翰 梅西时，他的父亲Hamon de Massey V35岁，母亲Alice de Whitney24岁。他于1267年与Alice Beauchamp在英国爾鄧翰 梅西结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国爾鄧翰 梅西。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Raimundo . See Raymond .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Massey VI was born in 1230, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, his father, Hamon de Massey V, was 35 and his mother, Alice de Whitney, was 24. He married Alice Beauchamp in 1267, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Massey VI est né en 1230, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon de Massey V, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice de Whitney, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice Beauchamp en 1267, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon de Massey VI 1230 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon de Massey V 35 und seine Mutter Alice de Whitney 24. Er hat 1267 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England Alice Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Beauchamp nel 1267, nel Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey VIが1230年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた時，父Hamon de Massey Vは35歳，母Alice de Whitneyは24歳であった。1267年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイでAlice Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Massey VI(이)가 1230년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Massey V(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Whitney(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1267년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 Alice Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 던함 마시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Massey VI nasceu em 1230, em Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamon de Massey V, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Whitney, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Beauchamp em 1267, em Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Massey VI родился в 1230 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamon de Massey V было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Whitney, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Beauchamp в 1267 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon de Massey VI nació en 1230, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon de Massey V, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice de Whitney, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice Beauchamp en 1267, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
